com.chemaxon.descriptors.fingerprints.cfp

Interface CfpComparator

  • All Superinterfaces:
    DescriptorComparator<BinaryVectorDescriptor>, Serializable

    @Beta
public interface CfpComparator
extends DescriptorComparator<BinaryVectorDescriptor>
    Comparator for Cfp descriptor representation.

    Please note that this class is marked with @Beta annotation, so it can be subject of incompatible changes or removal in later releases.

    Author:
    Gabor Imre

      • Methods inherited from interface com.chemaxon.descriptors.common.DescriptorComparator
